name: Modal
description: Dialog overlay with backdrop, focus trap, size variants, and keyboard navigation.

closeable.description: Whether the modal can be closed by the user

closeOnEscape.description: Close modal when Escape key is pressed

closeOnClickOutside.description: Close modal when backdrop is clicked

trapFocus.description: Trap keyboard focus within the modal

header.description: Modal title content displayed in the header bar

decision_rule: Use for confirmations, detail views, and overlaid content. Size md for confirmations, lg for forms, xl for detail views. In Filament admin, use Action::make()->modal() instead.

filament_equivalent.note: In Filament, use Action::make()->modal() for modal dialogs
